rationale: Section 47.002 merely establishes the fund and enumerates its sources, including legislative appropriations. Increasing the homestead exemption does not conflict with the fund's existence or its described funding sources.
quote: (1) money appropriated by the legislature for deposit to the credit of the fund;
_note: No direct conflict. The proposed change may increase pressure on legislative appropriations to the fund, but §47.002 already contemplates such appropriations as a funding source.
